records.ety: [ Cf. Prob. E. hobbledygee with a limping movement; also F. hobereau, a country squire, E. hobby, and OF. hoi to-day; perh. the orig. sense was, an upstart of to-day.]

defs: A youth between boy and man; an awkward, gawky young fellow .
quotes: All the men, boys, and hobbledehoys attached to the farm.
